scamalytics.notes: Scamalytics shows high levels of web traffic with suspected fraudulent activity. Risk score 62/100 means approximately 62% suspected fraudulent.

reddit.notes: Some complaints about location switching issues and captchas. Generally seen as legitimate but premium pricing.

notes: Large enterprise proxy provider (175M+ residential, 2M datacenter). Founded 2015, Lithuania. Mixed reviews - praised for support but some service quality complaints.
